title: Quran, Sura 88: Al-Ghashiya
description: Sura 88 (Al-Ghashiya: The Overwhelming) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 88 (Al-Ghashiya: The Overwhelming) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming Event? Some faces, that Day, will be humbled, working hard and exhausted.
